title: dolichos serpens
intro: Dolichos serpens, also known as the climbing bean or twining dolichos, is a perennial vine native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling, relieving urinary tract issues, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dolichos serpens can be prepared into herbal remedies like tea, infusion, or poultice, and is also used in traditional African medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
